_meta.note: TRANSITIONAL. This file no longer GATES source:'audit' (the distilled data/corpus/patterns-*.json do) and its per-SC `tier` fields are IGNORED by code — the SC-level tier is recomputed from `orgs` via tierForOrgs (very-common >=15, common 8-14, occasional 3-7), so a stale hand-typed tier can never re-arm a mis-tier bug. The file is retained ONLY to supply, for the 10 SCs it covers, the org INTEGER (rendered as N/26 orgs) and the SC-generic `fix`. These org integers are unrecoverable from the committed patterns (the distiller stripped org_id after the k>=3 gate; _meta.corpusOrgs is corpus-wide, not per-SC) and the distiller cannot re-run, so deleting this file would lose them. Frequencies are real: 643 findings across 26 orgs in Binclusive's dynamic-audit corpus. Keyed by WCAG Success Criterion.

1.3.1.fix: Use real semantics: associate every form field with a <label> via id (not placeholder-only); use <ul>/<li> or <table> for lists; wrap main content in <main> and footer in <footer>.

4.1.2.fix: Give every interactive control an accessible name (aria-label/aria-labelledby); convey state for custom tabs/menus (e.g. selected/expanded); prefer a native <button>.

2.4.4.fix: Give links discernible text or an aria-label that identifies the destination; never ship empty or icon-only links without a name.

1.1.1.fix: Provide alt text for informative images; give decorative images an empty alt.

2.1.1.fix: Make interactive elements keyboard-operable; use native <button>/<a> instead of <div onClick>.

3.3.2.fix: Provide visible labels and instructions for every form field.

2.4.1.fix: Provide a skip-to-content mechanism and proper landmark regions.

2.4.3.fix: Manage focus order; move focus sensibly on view/route changes.

4.1.3.fix: Announce dynamic status changes via a live region (note: runtime behavior, not statically detectable).

3.3.1.fix: Identify form errors in text and tie them to the field.
